side_effects.description: BPC messes with some people's neurotransmitters when fixing the blood-brain barrier

protocol_notes: Recommends cycling BPC-157 (max 6 weeks personally). States it needs to be cycled and you cannot keep body in constant repair state for prolonged periods. Recommends reconstituting vial and taking orally or nasally rather than pills due to cost. Holds gains after cycling and can restart in couple weeks.
